name: http-request
description: Make outbound HTTP requests to external APIs.

SANITIZE_FOR_LLM.description: When true, sanitizes the HTTP response for safe LLM consumption: strips HTML tags, enforces MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH, and wraps the result in [EXTERNAL_CONTENT_BEGIN]...[EXTERNAL_CONTENT_END] delimiters so the LLM can distinguish external content from instructions.

MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH.description: Maximum byte length of the response body when SANITIZE_FOR_LLM is true. Content beyond this limit is truncated with a [TRUNCATED] marker before being passed to downstream nodes. Default: 8192 bytes.
